[Sun 2026-04-05 16:00 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status. [Subagent Task]: # D&D Remodel — Agent 3: Play Tab + Party Tab Content Build the content for the Play and Party tabs in ~/dnd-app/frontend/index.html. ## Read First - ~/dnd-app/frontend/index.html (find #tab-play and #tab-party placeholders) - ~/dnd-app/ULTRAPLAN-REMODEL.md (sections 4.1 Play Tab and 4.2 Party Tab) - Look at existing dice roller, initiative tracker, and character sheet code in the current file ## IMPORTANT: Reuse Existing JS The current index.html already has dice rolling, initiative tracking, and character sheet JS. You need to: 1. Find the existing functions (rollDice, addToInitiative, renderCharacter, etc.) 2. Keep those functions 3. Just rebuild the HTML that they render into ## Play Tab (#tab-play) ### Dice Roller Section ```html

🎲 Dice Roller

``` ### CSS for Dice ```css .dice-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .dice-btn { padding: 20px; border-radius: var(--radius); border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg-card); color: var(--text); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; min-height: 64px; text-align: center; } .dice-btn:hover { border-color: var(--gold-dim); background: var(--gold-bg); color: var(--gold); } .dice-btn:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .dice-btn.d20 { grid-column: span 3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(212,167,58,0.1), rgba(212,167,58,0.04)); border-color: var(--gold-dim); color: var(--gold); font-size: 24px; } .dice-result { text-align: center; padding: 24px; margin: 12px 0; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); } .result-number { font-size: 64px; font-weight: 700; font-family: var(--font-mono); color: var(--gold); animation: diceReveal 0.3s var(--ease); } .result-number.crit { color: var(--success); text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(134,239,172,0.5); } .result-number.fumble { color: var(--danger); } .result-detail { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px; } @keyframes diceReveal { from { transform: scale(0.5) rotate(180deg); opacity: 0; } to { transform: scale(1) rotate(0); opacity: 1; } } .custom-roll { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .dice-input { flex: 1; padding: 10px 12px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); color: var(--text); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 14px; } .roll-btn { padding: 10px 20px; background: var(--gold-bg); border: 1px solid var(--gold-dim); color: var(--gold); border-radius: var(--radius); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; } .roll-history { max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto; } .roll-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding: 6px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 12px; } ``` ### Quick Actions Section ```html

⚔️ Quick Actions

``` ### Initiative Tracker Section ```html

⚡ Initiative

``` ## Party Tab (#tab-party) ### Party Overview ```html

📋 Party

``` ### CSS for Party ```css .party-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .char-card { background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .char-card:hover { border-color: var(--gold-dim); } .char-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 8px; } .char-name { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-bright); } .char-class { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted); } .char-hp-bar { height: 6px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 6px; } .hp-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 3px; transition: width 0.3s, background 0.3s; } .hp-fill.high { background: var(--success); } .hp-fill.mid { background: var(--warning); } .hp-fill.low { background: var(--danger); } .char-stats { display: flex; gap: 16px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); font-family: var(--font-mono); } ``` ## Rules - Read the EXISTING index.html JS code to find current function names for dice/initiative/character - Reuse those functions — just provide new HTML structure they render into - If functions reference old DOM IDs, update the HTML to use those same IDs - Add CSS to styles.css (append, don't overwrite — Agent 2 handles the base) - Wait — actually Agent 2 is rewriting styles.css. # ULTRAPLAN: D&D Paul Simulator — TOTAL UI/UX REMODEL + AI Assistant

**Author:** Michael (ULTRAPLAN subagent)  
**Date:** 2026-04-05  
**Status:** PLAN — Do NOT execute until Lucy approves  
**Philosophy:** K.I.S.S. — "aku ingin orang bodoh pun paham pake aplikasi ini"

---

## Table of Contents

1. [Executive Summary](#1-executive-summary)
2. [New App Architecture](#2-new-app-architecture)
3. [AI Assistant Specification](#3-ai-assistant-specification)
4. [UI Component Inventory](#4-ui-component-inventory)
5. [Onboarding Flow](#5-onboarding-flow)
6. [CSS / Design System](#6-css--design-system)
7. [4-Agent Execution Plan](#7-4-agent-execution-plan)
8. [Migration Plan](#8-migration-plan)
9. [Mobile-First Responsive](#9-mobile-first-responsive)
10. [Risk Assessment](#10-risk-assessment)

---

## 1. Executive Summary

### What We're Doing
Transforming a 3-page, 9-sidebar-nav D&D companion app into a single-page, 4-tab, mobile-first app with an integrated AI assistant. Merging `guide.html` and `flow.html` into `index.html`. Replacing the sidebar nav with a bottom tab bar.

### Key Decisions
| Decision | Choice | Why |
|----------|--------|-----|
| Navigation | Bottom tab bar (4 tabs) | Mobile thumb-friendly, K.I.S.S. |
| AI Integration | New chat panel + backend endpoint | Uses existing Bedrock via Council |
| Pages | Single `index.html` | Zero page switches |
| Sub-features | Slide-in panels (not pages, not modals) | Full-screen feel, back button |
| Design | Apex Dark + Amber (refined) | Already partially done, D&D fantasy feel |
| CSS | Complete rewrite of `styles.css` | Current 6130 lines is unmaintainable |

### What Gets Killed
- `guide.html` → content becomes contextual help tooltips + "Guide" panel in More tab
- `flow.html` → content is purely documentation, not user-facing; archive it
- Left sidebar nav (desktop) → replaced by bottom tab bar on all screens
- MAGI sidebar (Apex sidebar from parent app) → removed from D&D pages
- 9 sidebar nav items → 4 bottom tabs
- Spectator mode → moves to More tab (low priority feature)

### What Gets Added
- **AI Assistant tab** (chat with session context)
- **Bottom tab bar** (Play, Party, AI, More)
- **Slide-in panel system** (for sub-features)
- **Solo Adventure** flow (AI DM, already partially built)
- **Contextual help** (? icons with tooltips)

---

## 2. New App Architecture

### 2.1 Single `index.html` Structure

```
index.html
├── <head> (fonts, styles.css)
├── <body>
│   ├── #login-screen (onboarding — visible when not authenticated)
│   │   ├── .onboard-hero (dragon + title)
│   │   ├── .onboard-buttons (3 big buttons: Create Game, Join Game, Solo)
│   │   ├── #create-flow (step-by-step DM creation)
│   │   ├── #join-flow (PIN entry for players)
│   │   └── #solo-flow (character select → genre → go)
│   │
│   ├── #app-screen (main app — visible after auth)
│   │   ├── #app-header (room info bar — PIN, name, role)
│   │   ├── #tab-content (main content area)
│   │   │   ├── #tab-play (dice + initiative + quick actions)
│   │   │   ├── #tab-party (party overview + character sheets)
│   │   │   ├── #tab-ai (AI assistant chat)
│   │   │   └── #tab-more (grid of feature cards)
│   │   ├── #panel-container (slide-in panels from More)
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="spells"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="monsters"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="npcs"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="map"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="notes"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="guide"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="history"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="settings"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="wiki"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="encounters"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="arena"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="journal"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="relationships"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="compendium"]
│   │   │   ├── .panel[data-panel="rulebook"]
│   │   │   └── .panel[data-panel="chat"] (in-game text chat)
│   │   └── #bottom-tabs (fixed tab bar)
│   │
│   └── <script src="/dnd/app.js"></script>
```

content.text:
### 4.1 Play Tab (Most Used)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ═══ PLAY ═══            ⚙️ Sound  │
│                                     │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │     DICE ROLLER              │   │
│  │  ┌────┐ ┌────┐ ┌────┐      │   │
│  │  │ d4 │ │ d6 │ │ d8 │      │   │
│  │  └────┘ └────┘ └────┘      │   │
│  │  ┌────┐ ┌────┐ ┌─────┐    │   │
│  │  │d10 │ │d12 │ │ d20 │    │   │
│  │  └────┘ └────┘ └─────┘    │   │
│  │                              │   │
│  │  Modifier: [+0 ▼] [🎲 Roll] │   │
│  │                              │   │
│  │  ┌──────────────────────┐   │   │
│  │  │      ╔══════╗        │   │   │
│  │  │      ║  17  ║        │   │   │
│  │  │      ╚══════╝        │   │   │
│  │  │   1d20+3 = 14+3     │   │   │
│  │  └──────────────────────┘   │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                     │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  QUICK ACTIONS               │   │
│  │  [⚔️ Attack] [🛡️ Save]     │   │
│  │  [🎯 Skill Check] [Adv/Dis] │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                     │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  ⚔️ INITIATIVE (if active)   │   │
│  │  ► Goblin 1  ■■■■░░ 7/7    │   │
│  │    Thorin     ■■■■■■ 28/28 │   │
│  │    Goblin 2   ■■░░░░ 3/7   │   │
│  │  [Next Turn ▶] (DM only)   │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                     │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  📜 ROLL HISTORY             │   │
│  │  Thorin: 1d20+5 → 18       │   │
│  │  DM: 2d6+3 → 11            │   │
│  │  Lyra: 1d8+2 → 7           │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                     │
│ [🎲 Play] [📋 Party] [🤖 AI] [☰] │
└─────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Dice Buttons:**
- Size: 64×64px each (mobile touch-friendly)
- d20 is larger: 72×72px, gold accent border
- Tap = instant roll (no separate "Roll" button needed for quick rolls)
- Result: BIG number (48px font), centered in dice tray
- Animation: number rapidly cycles then lands on result (200ms)
- Nat 20: gold glow pulse + "CRITICAL!" text
- Nat 1: red glow pulse + "FUMBLE!" text

**Quick Actions:**
- 4 big buttons in a 2×2 grid
- Each sets up a preset roll (d20 + modifier from character sheet)
- "Attack" → d20 + character's attack modifier
- "Save" → opens picker for which save, then rolls
- "Skill Check" → opens picker for which skill, then rolls
- "Adv/Dis" → toggle, stays active until toggled off

**Initiative Tracker (compact mode):**
- Only shows when combat is active (via WebSocket state)
- Shows initiative order as a vertical list
- Current turn highlighted with gold left border
- HP bars: green→yellow→red inline
- DM gets "Next Turn" button
- Players get read-only view
- Tapping a combatant name (DM only) → shows HP adjustment +/- buttons

**Roll History:**
- Scrollable list, most recent on top
- Shows: Player name, notation, result
- Nat 20s/Nat 1s highlighted with special styling
- Max 50 displayed, scrollable

### 4.2 Party Tab

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ═══ PARTY ═══                      │
│                                     │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  🧙 Thorin Ironforge         │   │
│  │  Dwarf Fighter L5            │   │
│  │  HP: ■■■■■■■■░░ 28/35       │   │
│  │  AC: 18  |  Init: +1         │   │
│  │                          [>] │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                     │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │  🧝 Lyra Moonwhisper         │   │
│  │  Elf Wizard L5                │   │
│  │  HP: ■■■■░░░░░░ 15/22       │   │
│  │  AC: 13  |  Init: +3         │   │
│  │                          [>] │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                     │
│  (DM: tap [>] to view full sheet)  │
│  (Player: tap own card to edit)    │
│                                     │
│ [🎲 Play] [📋 Party] [🤖 AI] [☰] │
└─────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Party Card:**
- Each character as a card with: avatar (if uploaded, else emoji), name, species/class/level, HP bar, AC, Initiative bonus
- Tap card → opens full character sheet as a slide-in panel
- DM sees ALL characters (read-only tap to expand)
- Players see ALL party members as summary cards, can only EDIT their own
- HP bar: gradient green (#10B981) → yellow (#F59E0B) → red (#EF4444)
- DM can tap HP bar → opens quick +/- HP adjuster

**Character Sheet (slide-in panel):**
- Same data as current character sheet, but reorganized for mobile:
  - Top: Avatar + Name + Species/Class/Level (1 row)
  - Combat stats bar: AC | HP | Speed | Initiative | Prof Bonus (horizontal scroll if needed)
  - Ability scores: 2×3 grid (not 6-across — too cramped on mobile)
  - Saves + Skills: collapsible sections
  - Spell Slots: if spellcaster, show tracker
  - Notes: text area
  - Equipment: text area
- Save button → auto-save with debounce (already implemented)

### 4.3 AI Tab (NEW)

See Section 3.3 above for HTML structure.

**Layout:**
- Welcome screen with suggested prompts (shown when no history)
- Chat messages area (scrollable, auto-scroll to bottom)
- Input bar fixed above the bottom tab bar
- AI messages: left-aligned, dark card with gold accent
- User messages: right-aligned, amber/gold card
- Typing indicator: "..." animation while AI is thinking
- Each AI message has a small "📋 Copy" button

### 4.4 More Tab

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ═══ MORE ═══                       │
│                                     │
│  ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐          │
│  │  📖     │ │  🐉     │          │
│  │ Spells  │ │Monsters │          │
│  └─────────┘ └─────────┘          │
│  ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐          │
│  │  👤     │ │  🗺️     │          │
│  │  NPCs   │ │  Map    │          │
│  └─────────┘ └─────────┘          │
│  ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐          │
│  │  📝     │ │  📖     │          │
│  │ Notes   │ │ Wiki    │          │
│  └─────────┘ └─────────┘          │
│  ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐          │
│  │  📚     │ │  📜     │          │
│  │Compen-  │ │History  │          │
│  │ dium    │ │         │          │
│  └─────────┘ └─────────┘          │
│  ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐          │
│  │  📖     │ │  ⚙️     │          │
│  │ Guide   │ │Settings │          │
│  └─────────┘ └─────────┘          │
│                                     │
│ [🎲 Play] [📋 Party] [🤖 AI] [☰] │
└─────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Grid layout:** 2 columns of feature cards
- Each card: icon (large emoji, 32px) + label
- Tap → opens slide-in panel with the feature
- DM-only features shown only to DM (Monsters, NPCs, Notes, Encounters, Wiki-edit)
- Cards order by frequency of use

**Feature cards inventory:**

| Card | Icon | Who Sees | Opens Panel |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| Spells | 📖 | Everyone | Spell search + filter + detail |
| Monsters | 🐉 | DM only | Bestiary + custom + AI generate |
| NPCs | 👤 | DM only | NPC manager + AI generate |
| Map | 🗺️ | Everyone | Battle map (canvas) |
| Notes | 📝 | DM only | Session notes + AI summary + Obsidian save |
| Wiki | 📖 | Everyone | World wiki (DM can edit, players read) |

<div id="tab-party" class="tab-content">
        <style>
          /* ── Party Tab Styles ── */
          .party-tab-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 16px; }
          .party-tab-header .section-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gold, #d4a73a); margin: 0; }
          .add-char-btn { padding: 10px 18px; background: var(--gold-bg, rgba(212,167,58,0.08)); border: 1px solid var(--gold-dim, rgba(212,167,58,0.3)); color: var(--gold, #d4a73a); border-radius: var(--radius, 8px); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; min-height: 48px; transition: all 0.15s; }
          .add-char-btn:hover { background: rgba(212,167,58,0.15); border-color: var(--gold, #d4a73a); }
          .party-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
          .char-card { background: var(--bg-card, rgba(255,255,255,0.03)); border: 1px solid var(--border, rgba(255,255,255,0.08)); border-radius: var(--radius, 8px); padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; position: relative; }
          .char-card:hover { border-color: var(--gold-dim, rgba(212,167,58,0.3)); background: rgba(212,167,58,0.04); }
          .char-card:active { transform: scale(0.98); }
          .char-card.is-active-turn { border-left: 3px solid var(--gold, #d4a73a); }
          .char-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 10px; }
          .char-avatar-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
          .char-avatar-sm { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(212,167,58,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border, rgba(255,255,255,0.08)); }
          .char-avatar-sm img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
          .char-name-wrap { min-width: 0; }
          .char-name { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-bright, #e6edf3); display: block; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
          .char-class { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted, #6e7681); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; display: block; margin-top: 2px; }
          .char-hp-bar { height: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 8px; }

          .play-section { margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 16px; background: var(--bg-card, rgba(255,255,255,0.03)); border: 1px solid var(--border, rgba(255,255,255,0.08)); border-radius: var(--radius, 8px); }
          .play-section .section-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-bright, #e6edf3); margin: 0 0 14px 0; }

          /* Dice Grid */
          .dice-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
          .play-dice-btn { padding: 20px; border-radius: var(--radius, 8px); border: 1px solid var(--border, rgba(255,255,255,0.08)); background: var(--bg-card, rgba(255,255,255,0.03)); color: var(--text, #c9d1d9); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; min-height: 64px; text-align: center; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; user-select: none; }
          .play-dice-btn:hover { border-color: var(--gold-dim, rgba(212,167,58,0.3)); background: var(--gold-bg, rgba(212,167,58,0.08)); color: var(--gold, #d4a73a); }
          .play-dice-btn:active { transform: scale(0.95); }
          .play-dice-btn.d20-btn { grid-column: span 3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(212,167,58,0.1), rgba(212,167,58,0.04)); border-color: var(--gold-dim, rgba(212,167,58,0.3)); color: var(--gold, #d4a73a); font-size: 24px; min-height: 72px; }
          .play-dice-btn.d20-btn:hover { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(212,167,58,0.18), rgba(212,167,58,0.08)); }
          .play-dice-btn.d100-btn { grid-column: span 3; font-size: 16px; min-height: 48px; opacity: 0.7; }
          .play-dice-btn.d100-btn:hover { opacity: 1; }

          /* Dice Result Display */
          .play-dice-result { text-align: center; padding: 24px 16px; margin: 12px 0; background: var(--bg-card, rgba(255,255,255,0.03)); border: 1px solid var(--border, rgba(255,255,255,0.08)); border-radius: var(--radius, 8px); display: none; }
          .play-dice-result.visible { display: block; }
          .play-result-number { font-size: 64px; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; color: var(--gold, #d4a73a); animation: playDiceReveal 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); line-height: 1; }

content.text:
All 25 critical DOM IDs preserved with exactly 1 instance each. Everything looks solid.

---

## Summary of what was accomplished:

### Play Tab (`#tab-play`) — NEW
Built a merged Play tab combining dice roller, quick actions, initiative tracker, roll history, and loot generator:

1. **Dice Roller Section** — 3×2 grid of dice buttons (d4–d12) + full-width d20 button with gold accent + multi-dice row (2d6, 3d6, 4d6, 4d6 drop low, Advantage, Disadvantage) + modifier selector + mode selector (Normal/Advantage/Disadvantage) + custom notation input + Roll button
2. **Dice Tray** — Reuses existing `#dice-tray`, `#dice-tray-dice`, `#dice-tray-result`, `#result-total`, `#result-detail`, `#result-special` DOM elements that `showTrayAnimation()` renders into
3. **Quick Actions** — 2×2 grid: Attack Roll, Saving Throw, Skill Check, Damage (2d6) — all using existing `dice-preset-btn` class that app.js hooks into
4. **Initiative Tracker** — `#initiative-list` for `renderInitiative()` + DM controls (Add, Add Players, Next Turn, Reset) in `#dm-init-controls` + Add Combatant modal with all form fields
5. **Roll History** — `#roll-history` div that `addRollToHistory()` / `renderRollHistory()` render into
6. **Loot Generator** — `#loot-generator-section` (hidden, DM-only) with CR selector, type selector, generate button

### Party Tab (`#tab-party`) — REBUILT
Rebuilt with mobile-first card layout:

1. **Header** — "📋 Party" title + "Add Character" button (wired to `newCharacter()`)
2. **Character Cards** — Dynamic rendering via `renderNewPartyCards()` that hooks into existing `renderPartyGrid()`. Each card shows: avatar (image or 🧙 emoji), character name (Cinzel font), species/class/level (JetBrains Mono), HP bar with color coding (green >50%, yellow 25-50%, red <25%), stats (HP, AC, Init modifier), expand arrow
3. **Empty State** — Friendly placeholder when no characters exist
4. **Character Detail Modal** — Preserved existing `#party-detail-modal` for `showPartyCharacterDetail()`
5. **Backward Compatibility** — Hidden `#party-grid` preserved for existing `renderPartyGrid()` calls

### CSS Strategy
- All CSS in `<style>` blocks inside each tab-pane div (avoids conflicts with Agent 2's styles.css rewrite)
- All buttons ≥48px touch target (min-height enforced)
- Fonts: JetBrains Mono for stats/numbers, Cinzel for titles/names
- Dice result: 64px gold number with animation
- HP bars: 3-tier color system with CSS transitions
- Dark theme with amber/gold accents matching existing design system

### JS Compatibility
- Bridge script hooks `renderPartyGrid()` to also render new party cards
- All existing DOM IDs preserved (25 verified — 1 instance each, no duplicates)
- Old `#tab-dice` and `#tab-initiative` kept as hidden empty divs for backward compat with any remaining references in app.js
- Existing event listeners (dice buttons, preset buttons, initiative controls) all work because same `data-*` attributes and class names are preserved
